# Lebanon Dental Care Clinic

> Trusted dental clinic in Kenya offering braces, veneers, cleanings, root canals, extractions, children's dentistry and emergency dental care.

Lebanon Dental Care Clinic provides comprehensive, modern dental treatment with over 10 years of experience and 1,000+ happy patients. Our mission is to deliver gentle, professional care that protects every patient's long-term oral health.

## Pages
- [Home](/): Overview of services, experience and patient testimonials
- [About Us](/about): Our story, team and approach to dental care
- [Services](/services): Full list of dental treatments offered
- [Book Appointment](/book): Online booking with WhatsApp confirmation
- [Blog](/blog): Dental tips, treatment guides and oral health advice
- [Testimonials](/testimonials): Real reviews from our patients
- [Contact](/contact): Location, hours and emergency line

## Services
- [Teeth Cleaning](/services/teeth-cleaning)
- [Fixed Orthodontics (Braces)](/services/fixed-orthodontics)
- [Root Canal Treatment](/services/root-canal-treatment)
- [Tooth Extraction](/services/tooth-extraction)
- [Veneers](/services/veneers)
- [Fixed Dentures](/services/fixed-dentures)
- [Gum Disease Treatment](/services/gum-disease-treatment)
- [Children's Dentistry](/services/childrens-dentistry)
- [Emergency Dental Care](/services/emergency-dental-care)
